requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Conductive Charging Safety and EMC Baseline

summary.en: Jordan projects and procurement files may request IEC-based evidence for EV conductive charging systems, especially IEC 61851-1 general requirements and the IEC 61851 EMC and DC charging station parts relevant to the charger type. Evidence should cover charging modes, control pilot behavior, protective earthing, residual-current protection assumptions, insulation monitoring where applicable, environmental ratings, markings, and off-board charger EMC.
summary.zh: 约旦项目和采购文件可能要求电动汽车传导充电系统提供IEC体系证据，尤其是IEC 61851-1通用要求，以及与充电桩类型相关的IEC 61851 EMC和直流充电站部分。证据应覆盖充电模式、控制导引行为、保护接地、剩余电流保护假设、适用时的绝缘监测、环境等级、标识和非车载充电机EMC。
summary.zht: 約旦項目和採購文件可能要求電動汽車傳導充電系統提供IEC體系證據，尤其是IEC 61851-1通用要求，以及與充電樁類型相關的IEC 61851 EMC和直流充電站部分。證據應覆蓋充電模式、控制導引行為、保護接地、剩餘電流保護假設、適用時的絕緣監測、環境等級、標識和非車載充電機EMC。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-23 / IEC 61851-24 where DC charging applies

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487.1 as the conductive charging system baseline, with related EMC and DC charging provisions and GB/T 27930 communication for many off-board DC chargers. GB/T 18487 is technically related to IEC 61851 but a China-only report may not show all IEC clauses, edition alignment, English documentation, local installation assumptions, or third-party acceptance requested in Jordan.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB/T 18487.1作为传导充电系统基线，并结合相关EMC和直流充电规定，以及许多非车载直流充电机采用的GB/T 27930通信。GB/T 18487与IEC 61851具有技术关联，但仅中国报告可能不能展示全部IEC条款、版本一致性、英文资料、当地安装假设或约旦要求的第三方接受度。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB/T 18487.1作為傳導充電系統基線，並結合相關EMC和直流充電規定，以及許多非車載直流充電機採用的GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T 18487與IEC 61851具有技術關聯，但僅中國報告可能不能展示全部IEC條款、版本一致性、英文資料、當地安裝假設或約旦要求的第三方接受度。

gap.en: The practical gap is evidence mapping. A Jordan project file should include an IEC 61851 clause matrix, safety and EMC test reports, installation instructions for Jordan's supply system, RCD and earthing assumptions, and clear identification of whether the charger is AC Mode 3, DC Mode 4, or another configuration.
gap.zh: 实务差距在于证据映射。约旦项目资料应包括IEC 61851条款矩阵、安全及EMC测试报告、适用于约旦供电系统的安装说明、RCD和接地假设，并明确识别充电桩属于交流Mode 3、直流Mode 4或其他配置。
gap.zht: 實務差距在於證據映射。約旦項目資料應包括IEC 61851條款矩陣、安全及EMC測試報告、適用於約旦供電系統的安裝說明、RCD和接地假設，並明確識別充電樁屬於交流Mode 3、直流Mode 4或其他配置。

mandatory_status.target: Project, procurement, standards-adoption, or licensing dependent; IEC 61851 evidence may be required by customer, consultant, JSMO route, EMRC route, or utility review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence is common for China domestic chargers but is not automatically accepted as IEC 61851 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build an IEC 61851 evidence pack instead of relying only on GB/T 18487 reports. Jordan-side acceptance usually turns on the charger mode, installation design, and reviewer-specified IEC edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应建立IEC 61851证据包，而不是仅依赖GB/T 18487报告。约旦侧接受度通常取决于充电模式、安装设计和审查方指定的IEC版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應建立IEC 61851證據包，而不是僅依賴GB/T 18487報告。約旦側接受度通常取決於充電模式、安裝設計和審查方指定的IEC版本。
